examples: Sturgeon fishing has been pretty good in the estuary.
The canal was built to connect Sheffield with the Humber estuary.
The river opens up suddenly into a broad estuary.
The beach is part of the Taw-Torridge estuary area, the tidal well above Barnstaple and Bideford.
After the wide-open water of the estuary, the mangrove forest feels eerie and magical.
